name: FastmailMail
description: Read, search and send Fastmail email over IMAP/SMTP.
note: Fastmail refuses the account password for IMAP — create an app password with Mail access under Settings → Privacy & Security → Integrations.

setupSteps.text: Create an app password with “Mail (IMAP/SMTP)” access.

mail.authHint: check the password is an APP password with Mail access — Fastmail refuses the account password over IMAP.
